Hestui Totem Spirit:
What do you know about our enemy? I am talking about Kasha Orcs, although I'm not sure these traitors deserve to be called Orcs anymore.
Of course, there has always been feuding between Primary Orcs and High Orcs, but it's been 200 years since the last great conforntation. Until now, that is. Once the tribes of Primary Orcs received the Chaos Power, they united under the name of Kasha Orcs and began their attack.
The High Orcs haven't been able to stop them so far. Why did the Primary Orcs choose to serve Kasha, I wonder? Was it mundane thirst for power or something more sinister?
